summary: Tests appear to pass but job reports 343 errors with warnings about test execution and FIFO violations in pubsub channel concurrent access.
root_cause: Race conditions or ordering violations in pubsub channel concurrent access, evidenced by FIFO violations in conn_state_test.go and case ID mentioning timeout.

evidence.quote: testing: warning: no tests to run
evidence.reason: Indicates test execution was not performed as expected despite tests appearing in output
FIFO violations indicate race conditions or ordering issues in concurrent pubsub channel tests
High error count contradicts individual PASS results shown, suggesting systemic test execution issue

suggested_fix: Investigate FIFO violations in conn_state_test.go around line 526; review pubsub channel concurrent access patterns for race conditions and add proper synchronization or timeouts
